posts.title: ocamlTree
posts.text: 用Ocaml编写一个简单的树应用树是一种非常重要的数据结构，在这边记录一下用Ocaml来编写树结构的一点经验 纯函数式树结构-二叉搜索树在这种数据结构下我们不使用命令式的语法去编写数据结构 树数据结构定义1type 'a tree = Empty | Node of 'a * 'a tree * 'a tree 用这样的variants去定义一棵树，树由空结点和结点组成，结点由(值，左子树，右子树组成) 基础函数树上搜索1234let rec search value = function | Empty -> false | Node (v, left, right) -> v == value || search value left || search value right 获取树的大小(size)123let rec size = function | Empty -> 0 | Node (_, left, right) -> 1 + size left + size right 插入结点1234567let rec insert tree value = match tree with | Empty -> Node (value, Empty, Empty) | Node (nodeValue, left, right) -> if nodeValue = value then tree else if value > nodeValue then Node (nodeValue, insert left value, right) else Node (nodeValue, left, insert right value) 树的三种遍历方式1234567891011let rec mid_order = function | Empty -> [] | Node (value, left, right) -> mid_order left @ [value] @ mid_order rightlet rec pre_order = function | Empty -> [] | Node (value, left, right) -> (value :: mid_order left) @ mid_order rightlet rec post_order = function | Empty -> [] | Node (value, left, right) -> mid_order left @ mid_order right @ [value] Huffman树数据结构定义1234567type huffmanTree = Empty | HuffmanNode of huffmanNodeand huffmanNode = { data: char option ; count: int ; mutable left: huffmanTree ; mutable right: huffmanTree } 通过哈夫曼树生成编码表123456789101112let generateHuffmanCodeByTree tree = let code = ref [] in let rec generateCode nowCode tree = match tree with | Empty -> () | HuffmanNode {data; count; left; right} -> ( match data with | None -> generateCode (nowCode ^ "0") left ; generateCode (nowCode ^ "1") right | Some _data -> code := (data, nowCode) :: !code ) in generateCode "" tree ; code
